name: @metorial/svix
description: Send and manage webhooks as a service. Create and manage consumer applications, send webhook messages with typed event payloads, and configure delivery endpoints with event type and channel filtering. Register, update, schema-define, and import event types from OpenAPI. Manage endpoint headers, signing secrets, throttling, and JavaScript transformations. Precheck messages, inspect and expunge message payloads, retry failed deliveries, and bulk-recover messages. Generate embeddable consumer portal access for customers to manage endpoints, debug delivery, and replay webhooks. Monitor operational events such as endpoint changes and delivery attempt failures.
